ddls:
CREATE TABLE "installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "installation_count" INTEGER /* Number of installations on that date */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operating system */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES os_versions ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_active_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of activity */,
  "active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users on that date */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operating system */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_active_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_active_users_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_active_users_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES os_versions ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_active_users_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_rates" (
  "retention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of retention rate calculation */,
  "day_1" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 1 */,
  "day_3" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 3 */,
  "day_7" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 7 */,
  "day_14" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 14 */,
  "day_30" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 30 */,
  "day_60" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 60 */,
  "day_90" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 90 */,
  "day_120" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 120 */,
  "day_150" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 150 */,
  "day_180" INTEGER /* Retention rate on day 180 */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operating system */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_rates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_rates_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES os_versions ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_rates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operating system */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_demographics_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES os_versions ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_demographics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_demographics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operating system */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES os_versions ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_demographics ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "os_versions" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each os */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the os */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the os */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_os" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each os */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "os_id")
)
